title: The Samsung Galaxy S25+ Is Still One of the Best Premium Android Phones, and It's $300 Off Right Now
summary: Out of the lineup, the Galaxy S25+ is the middle-of-the-pack model, and a cheaper alternative to the then top-of-the-line Galaxy S25 Ultra . Arguably, the best competition for the Galaxy S25+ is the Google Pixel 9 , which is currently $628.
